# fetchRecordZoneChanges

**Instance Method**

Fetch changes to the specified record zones in the database.

## Declaration

```swift
Promise<CloudKit.RecordZoneChangesResponse, CloudKit.CKError> fetchRecordZoneChanges(
	CloudKit.RecordZoneChangesOptions|CloudKit.RecordZoneChangesOptions[] options
);
```

## Parameters

- **options**: Specifies the zones and what data to fetch from each. If you want to fetch from multiple zones, pass an array containing a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordZoneChangesOptions] dictionary for each zone.

## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordZoneChangesResponse] object, or rejects to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.

## Discussion

Use the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database/fetchDatabaseChanges] method to get the zones that contain changed records.

## Fetching Changes

- **databaseScope**: The type of database (public, private, or shared).
- **fetchDatabaseChanges**: Fetch changed record zones in the database.
